calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SUMMER M. SMITH FROM MURPHY PEARSON & FEENEY, 788-1900, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY
EDWARD METZ, 414-441-6042, PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY APPEARING IN PRO PER

THIS MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT H MEEKS' Motion For Fees And Costs is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Lisa Schwam, CSR #8994

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Summer M. Smith of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, 788-1900, appearing for defendant and moving party
Edward Metz, 441-6042, plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT H MEEKS' Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 is granted. Alleged conduct is clearly protected activity in context of litigation. Plaintiff has failed to carry burden of showing probability of prevailing and could not do so because conduct is absolutely privileged pursuant to Civil Code 47(b). Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Katherine Cuellar, CSR #3164
